TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_u_salukiyaw_nu_tatayna_-_u_sumamaday_a_palaw_nu_Sakizaya, title = u_salukiyaw_nu_tatayna_-_u_sumamaday_a_palaw_nu_Sakizaya, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/u_salukiyaw_nu_tatayna_-_u_sumamaday_a_palaw_nu_Sakizaya} }

S.FORM: == u salukiyaw nu tatayna - u sumamaday a palaw nu Sakizaya == kina inga sa, na nu Sakulay a niyazu', u tatayna nu Sakul musalukiyaw. mupalaw i lalikit nu niyazu'. namakay cuwaay a inga:
S.PHON: == u sar~ɾukijaw nu tatajna - u sumamadaj a par~ɾaw nu sakizaja == kina iŋa sa, na nu sakur~ɾaj a nijazuʔ~ʡ, u tatajna nu sakur~ɾ musar~ɾukijaw. mupar~ɾaw i r~ɾar~ɾikit nu nijazuʔ~ʡ. namakaj ʦuwaaj a iŋa:
S.FORM: == u salukiyaw nu tatayna - u sumamaday a palaw nu Sakizaya == kina inga sa, na nu Sakulay a niyazu', u tatayna nu Sakul musalukiyaw. mupalaw i lalikit nu niyazu'. namakay cuwaay a inga:
S.PHON: == u sar~ɾukijaw nu tatajna - u sumamadaj a par~ɾaw nu sakizaja == kina iŋa sa, na nu sakur~ɾaj a nijazuʔ~ʡ, u tatajna nu sakur~ɾ musar~ɾukijaw. mupar~ɾaw i r~ɾar~ɾikit nu nijazuʔ~ʡ. namakaj ʦuwaaj a iŋa:
